query:
SELECT qi.id, LEFT(qi.itemData, 300) as itemData_preview
FROM quote_items qi
JOIN quotes q ON qi.quoteId = q.id
WHERE q.quoteNumber = '33.0056-26'
LIMIT 2;
command:
